title: コマンド/vote が正常に作動しているか徹底的に調査してください
summary_text: **Findings (sidecar audit, no edits)** 1. High: `/vote` tests are present but not operationally enforced by CI/default test entrypoint. [skills/orchestra-delegator/package.json:13](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/skills/orchestra-delegator/package.json#L13) defines `test:vote`, but [ci.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/.github/workflows/ci.yml) has no step running it. 2. Medium: quality-gate validator is non-blocking for missing script wiring. [hooks/quality-gates/validate-gates.js:204](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/hooks/quality-gates/validate-gates.js#L204) initializes `allFound=true`, but missing scripts only `continue` and non-reference is only warning at [line 220](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/hooks/quality-gates/validate-gates.js#L220), so this check is effectively fail-open. 3. Confirmed: `auto-vote` missing consensus script is currently fail-closed in source. [hooks/auto-vote.sh:183](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/hooks/auto-vote.sh#L183)-[190](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/hooks/auto-vote.sh#L190) blocks with exit `2` unless explicit `FUGUE_FAIL_OPEN=true`. The integration test also asserts this at [tests/test-auto-vote-verdicts.sh:97](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/tests/test-auto-vote-verdicts.sh#L97)-[100](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/tests/test-auto-vote-verdicts.sh#L100). **Minimal change set to make new `/vote` tests operationally protective** 1. Add standard `test` alias in [skills/orchestra-delegator/package.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/skills/orchestra-delegator/package.json): set `"test": "npm run test:vote"` (aligns with existing repo package conventions). 2. Add one CI job/step in [ci.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/.github/workflows/ci.yml) to run that package test (`working-directory: skills/orchestra-delegator`, then `npm ci` + `npm test`). 3. Tighten validator to fail-closed for critical consensus wiring in [validate-gates.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/hooks/quality-gates/validate-gates.js): missing `consensus-vote.js` (or missing reference where required) should return non-zero, not warning-only. **Execution evidence** - `node --test ...consensus-logic/provider-preflight/consensus-config` passed (10/10). - `bash tests/test-auto-vote-verdicts.sh` passed (`auto-vote verdict tests passed`). - `node hooks/quality-gates/validate-gates.js` passed but with warning-only behavior, confirming current enforcement gap.
